notes: 2026-06-12 GPU1 loop-residual FutureSeed h120 mechanism test. D256/L12/loop6/all-loop, batch72/eval512/bfloat16/statepassing, FUTURE_SEED_UPDATE=loop_residual and FUTURE_SEED_DECAY=0.75. At step6800, h96/h108/h120/h132 loop6 exact=0.6484/0.2266/0.0000/0.0000; h120 blank_acc=0.6178 and loop6-loop3 exact gain=0.0000. Decision: stop by exact PID and switch to fixed FutureSeed context plus gated mutable scratch. Lesson: writing FutureSeed memory back into the backbone state helps easier transfer but does not solve the h120 global-coupling cliff.
